title: Dispatcher card item (GET /cards)
description: One card row from the dispatcher's board. As-built source of truth: the `cards` table in apps/dispatcher/src/board.rs (semantics per apps/manager/docs/contracts/schemas/task-card.schema.json — LOCKED interrupt model, server-stamped sender_class, fenced leases). claim_token-free by construction: the board never stores one. Board timestamps are epoch MILLISECONDS (`*_ms`, as-built). `needs` is a JSON array in the store, served as a string array. Filters: `state`, `recipient`, plus the shared limit/cursor/since. Consumers MUST ignore unknown fields.

card_id.description: Unique card id (UUID); consumers de-duplicate on it.

task_id.description: Tracker task this card belongs to (LOCKED: every card carries its task tie).

sender.description: Originating identity: a Matrix user id or a canonical agent handle.

sender_class.description: Stamped by the dispatcher from its own roster, never trusted from the sender.

recipient.description: Addressed handle; null = open pool work (pull). Pool cards lose recipient on reap; addressed cards keep it.

thread.description: Conversation thread id (Matrix thread-root event id or bus-assigned); replies carry the same thread.

requires_reply.description: true = sender expects an answer card on the same thread; tracked unanswered until one arrives. Stored INTEGER 0/1; served boolean.

interrupt_policy.description: defer = queue for the digest (default). The ONLY interrupting classes: principal_command (honored only when sender_class=principal), safety, task_clarification (only when task_id matches the recipient's current lease).

needs.description: Capability tags the work needs; surfaced only to agents whose registry provides cover them (needs is a subset of provides).

state.description: Board lifecycle state. dead = dead-letter after max reaps (human triage).

claimed_by.description: Handle of the current claim holder; null unless state=claimed.

lease_expires_at_ms.description: Epoch MILLISECONDS the claim lease expires (reapable after); null when unclaimed.

fence.description: Monotonic fencing token, incremented on reap; stale-fence writes are rejected by the board.

reaps.description: How many times this card's lease has been reaped; >= max_reaps -> dead.

reply_to.description: card_id this card answers, when it is a reply.

result.description: Worker-reported result recorded at done (as-built column on the cards table).

delivered.description: true = delivered to the recipient (digest/interrupt path). Stored INTEGER 0/1; served boolean.

addressed.description: true = posted with an explicit recipient (push); addressed cards keep their recipient across reap, pool cards do not. Stored INTEGER 0/1; served boolean.

created_at_ms.description: Epoch MILLISECONDS the card was posted (as-built).

updated_at_ms.description: Epoch MILLISECONDS of the last board write to this row (as-built).
